name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Climate change is an existential threat to our country and the entire planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
We are custodians of the earth, and it would be a moral disgrace if we left to future generations a planet that was unhealthy, unsafe, and uninhabitable.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW)

**Sign my petition: Tell Congress no more subsidies to the fossil fuel companies who lied to the American people and are destroying our planet for profit.**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_climate_speech/?source=em190514-2-30&t=2&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW)

* * *
Friends -
We are custodians of the earth, and it would be a moral disgrace if we left to future generations a planet that was unhealthy, unsafe, and uninhabitable.
Last night I joined my friend Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and others to speak about climate change at an event sponsored by the Sunrise Movement.
And what I told the crowd was that climate change is an existential threat to our country, to the entire world, and that if we do not act boldly and aggressively to transform our global energy system away from fossil fuels within the next few years, there will be irreparable harm done to the planet.
What significant temperature increases will mean is more drought, more crop failures, and more famine. Drinking water, already a precious commodity in many areas, will become even scarcer. Millions of people will be displaced by rising sea levels, extreme weather events, and flooding. Tropical diseases like malaria, dengue, and yellow fever will spread into parts of the world where they don’t currently exist.
All of this will likely lead to increased human suffering and death, but the results will be even more dire than that. The growing scarcity of basic human needs could well lead to perpetual warfare in regions around the world, as people fight over limited supplies of water, farmland, and other natural resources.
**I want to stress something I was laughed at for saying during the 2016 campaign, and that is that climate change is the greatest national security threat facing our country today.**
And if we are going to be honest about combating climate change, it is necessary for us to understand that we have an economy that is rigged and a political system that is profoundly corrupt.
In other words, we have a small number of incredibly powerful billionaires who exercise enormous influence over the economic and political life of the country.
There are a lot of parallels between what the fossil fuel industry is doing today and the tobacco industry of 50 years ago. Decades ago, large profitable corporations denied that cigarette smoking causes cancer and other diseases. Today, the fossil fuel industry, making billions every year, denies what carbon emissions are doing to our planet. They lie, lie and lie, and spend hundreds of millions of dollars to buy politicians who echo their lies.
In the last decade alone, the oil and gas industry has pumped more than $700 million worth of campaign contributions into federal, state and local elections. In that same time, they spent more than $1.5 billion lobbying in Washington, D.C.
The fossil fuel industry has been well rewarded for their spending. An IMF report found that direct and indirect subsidies for coal, oil and gas in the U.S. reached $649 billion in 2015.
**Maybe providing massive support to an industry that is destroying our planet makes sense to some people, but it damn well does not make sense to me.**
And here is even more. As a result of Trump’s tax cuts, nearly half of the Fortune 500 companies that paid zero in taxes last year were in the fossil fuel and utility industry.
**Let’s be clear: it is time to end all subsidies and tax breaks for the oil and gas companies.**
**These companies lied to the American people about the very existence of climate change and committed one of the greatest frauds in the history of our country.**
[**Add your name if you agree: Congress should no longer provide subsidies to the fossil fuel companies who lied to the American people and are destroying our planet for profit.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_climate_speech/?source=em190514-2-30&t=3&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW)**
And just as the tobacco industry was ultimately forced to pay for the fraud they committed – the fossil fuel industry must be forced to do the same.
They cannot destroy this planet with impunity.
So here is the major question that we must answer: How do we take on an industry with unlimited power and resources?
And here in my view, is the answer.
We need a political revolution. We need millions of people from one end of this country to the other to stand up and fight back to create environmental policy that works for all of us and not just the one percent.
We have got an enormous amount of work in front of us. We’ve got to educate. We've got to organize. And we’ve got to fight for political power.
The one percent has unlimited wealth and influence, but at the end of the day they are just one percent. And if my arithmetic is right, there are a lot more people in the 99 percent than in the one percent.
Let’s bring our people together. Let’s transform our energy system and let’s save the planet.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

* * *

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_climate_speech/?source=em190514-2-30&t=4&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1357_150750_xO3GaW&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=8&akid=1357%2E150750%2ExO3GaW).

name: Team Beto
subject: May 21: Beto on CNN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Today, we’re excited to share that Beto will join a CNN-televised town
hall on Tuesday, May 21 at 10 pm Eastern, 9 pm Central.

This is Beto’s first nationally-televised town hall since he announced
running for president. It’s a huge moment for our campaign, and an
opportunity for more people to connect with Beto’s message.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-cnn-town-hall-host/?source=ema20190514&t=1001&akid=31070%2E444211%2ERD9AVu ]Can you
host a watch party in Englewood for Beto’s CNN Town Hall on May 21?
By stepping up to host, you’re making your mark on our campaign.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-cnn-town-hall-host/?source=ema20190514&t=1002&akid=31070%2E444211%2ERD9AVu ]Host a watch party »

Hosting a watch party is easy and fun. You can gather your friends,
family, and neighbors. We’ll prepare you with everything you need to host
a great watch party -- a toolkit, personal support from an organizer, and
we’ll invite other supporters in your area so they can meet and join you,
too.

The more people who gather for these watch parties, the more people who
can learn about Beto’s vision for our country. Plus, the watch parties
will help people in your community build important connections that can
last for months to come.

But to have time to invite others in your community and make sure Beto has
a strong showing on May 21, we need you to sign up quickly (right now, if
you can).

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-cnn-town-hall-host/?source=ema20190514&t=1003&akid=31070%2E444211%2ERD9AVu ]Can you sign up to host a town hall watch party for Beto? Supporters in
Englewood would love to join you, and our skilled team will support
you every step of the way.

The town hall will take place in Des Moines, Iowa, which as you know is a
key state in this election. And that means Iowans will have a national
platform to talk with Beto about the issues that matter most to them. With
your help, we can make sure people everywhere can listen.

Thank you,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?source=ema20190514&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=31070%2E444211%2ERD9AVu ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190514footer&t=1005&refcode2=31070_444211_RD9AVu&akid=31070%2E444211%2ERD9AVu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=31070%2E444211%2ERD9AVu

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

subject: asking you to help Jeanne Shaheen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
We're about to ask you to support Sen. Shaheen's reelection campaign before tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline. Before we do, we want to be crystal clear about what could happen if she falls short tonight.
**Democrats cannot win back the Senate without winning in New Hampshire. Losing would mean giving the GOP Senate control for at least another two years.**
With Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump dead set on putting more ultraconservative justices on the Supreme Court, rolling back health care access and attacking our voting rights, we've got to protect vulnerable Democrats like Jeanne.
[**We told her we 'd help raise $6,000 for her campaign by midnight, and Jeanne is relying on your help to get there. name: Jason Yates
subject: This policy will fundamentally transform America - unless we stop it.
body:
| | Peter, The House of Representatives is expected to vote on the Equality Act in the coming weeks, and it is crucial that we **[let our elected representatives know we strongly oppose this policy](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=EEBJ6RSVgEowzFpEnCwJveF-bi2eN59mLA0RsyMslZs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190515p2a01&n=1)**. There are already 240 co-sponsors of the policy in the House of Representatives and 46 co-sponsors in the Senate. You may have [read our article from last week](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPMrQr3kq8Urxo9EeW_LXVVEA524YQ8bn1_w7ByPRImBiP_m7D6Rh-FrPVeDzzRZ_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190515p2a01&n=2) laying out the dangers of this legislation. **This Equality Act has the power to transform America as we know it.** It would add two new classes under the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and the Fair Housing Act: “sexual orientation” and “gender identity.” While this may seem harmless, the ramifications will be catastrophic, affecting free speech, freedom of conscience, and religious freedom. If the Equality Act becomes law, cases like Jack Phillips will not end in favor of religious liberty. Christians will be forced to pay for, and participate in, gender transitions and therapies that violate their faith. People of faith will lose protection under the law to freely follow their religious convictions in the public square. **Anyone that believes in biological sex will be punished for his or her sincerely held beliefs.** Women’s privacy and opportunity will be undermined as biological men will be permitted to use women’s restrooms, locker rooms, and any other facility designated for women. Discrimination will become standard in women’s sports as transgender males will be permitted to compete on girls sports teams, eliminating scholarships and opportunities for women to compete in sports at the highest level. **Parents, women, business owners, faith-based charities, teachers and medical professionals who hold a biblical worldview will all lose their right to religious conscience and freedom in the public square, or face discrimination and persecution.** The Equality Act is disguised with a positive word and seeks to destroy sex and gender as God defined it (Genesis 1:26-18) and religious freedom as we know it. Please **[take action today with our easy tool to contact your elected officials](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=EEBJ6RSVgEowzFpEnCwJveF-bi2eN59mLA0RsyMslZs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190515p2a01&n=3).** Tell them that you oppose the Equality Act because you believe in free speech and religious liberty. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=EEBJ6RSVgEowzFpEnCwJveF-bi2eN59mLA0RsyMslZs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190515p2a01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190515p2a01&n=5)
---

subject: Did you see the latest U.S. News Report? New Hampshire is thriving under Governor Sununu
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTU2NDc0NjU2NTY4MzgyNzc4JmM9YzB0MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTA0Nzk2NjQmZD10NnI1cjF4.F_LsxPOkI0j7XQZJ-eIpdE82AMoyl72w-KP-pmHLQxY)
| | |

|
---
---

---
| Derek,
U.S. News is out with it's 2019 Best States rankings, and New Hampshire is the _**SECOND**_ Best State overall.
---
---
| | | [](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTU2NDc0NjU2NTY4MzgyNzc4JmM9YzB0MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTA0Nzk2NjYmZD1oM3MxaTlq.iKvzwktczOqcMwI2S_5w-qwxmgDAG689u67YSTk3Fto)

| |

But no candidate will be nearly as strong a voice for women and families as Kirsten will be. She's got a plan to get dark money out of politics; she's the only candidate with an extensive reproductive rights agenda and she's refused to take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or fossil fuel executives--and we don't have an individual super PAC.

Jess

# **The Real Constitutional Crisis is the Democrats' Disregard for Justice**

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi is right: We are in the midst of a ‘constitutional crisis.’ It has nothing to do with President Donald Trump’s jousting with Congress over subpoenas, however; the crisis is fully one of the Democrats’ making as they — unfortunately aided by special counsel Robert Mueller — continue to disregard the pillars of justice and fairness that have underpinned America since its founding,” CNN contributor Scott Jennings writes in the _Courier-Journal_.

“It is hard to take Democrats seriously about Trump defying the norms of the presidency when they are actively assaulting our justice system, hypocritically refusing to accept election results (see: Georgia), trying to eliminate the Electoral College and pack the Supreme Court.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17ebf3451c&e=3ee4985eea)

|

| “Those who suggest Trump started this trade war with China have it backward. Beijing has been waging economic warfare on the United States for years — stealing our intellectual property, forcing our companies to transfer technology as a price of doing business in China and subsidizing state-owned enterprises to prevent U.S. businesses from competing,” Marc Thiessen writes in _[The Washington Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a011f34f9a&e=3ee4985eea)_.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Outlawing access to abortion -- including in cases of rape or incest. Threatening to punish doctors who provide abortion care with up to 99 years of jail time. This isn't a scene from The Handmaid's Tale. This is happening in Alabama -- in our country -- in the year 2019. Alabama just passed legislation banning abortions at every stage of pregnancy. Doctors performing abortions could face up to 99 years in prison, and the law includes no exceptions for rape or incest. This is a blatant attack on _Roe v. Wade_. It is a direct attack on women across our country. Restricting access to safe, legal abortion puts women’s lives at risk. **We cannot afford to wring our hands. We need to fight back now, raising our voices together to say we won’t be dragged backward and putting our collective power to work.** **Here’s how we can fight back:** **[Click here to split a donation to abortion rights groups on the front lines of this fight today. Take action today to defend access to safe, legal abortion in our country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190515-abortion?refcode=ema190515-Full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&refcode2=4724_5755789_71sosX&akid=4724%2E5755789%2E71sosX)** Your donation today will benefit the following organizations that are leading the fight to defend women’s rights and access to health care:
* **The Yellowhammer Fund** provides funding for anyone seeking care at one of Alabama's three abortion clinics and will help with other barriers to access (travel, lodging, etc.).

* **The Clinic Vest Project** provides free clinic escort vests to groups that service facilities that support the full range of reproductive health options including safe and legal abortion.

* **ARC Southeast** helps Southerners and their families navigate the pathways to access safe, compassionate, and affordable reproductive care by providing financial and logistical support and building power in our communities through advocacy, education, and leadership development.

* **The National Network of Abortion Funds** builds power with members to remove financial and logistical barriers to abortion access by centering people who have an abortion and organizing at the intersections of racial, economic, and reproductive justice.

These anti-choice bills in states like Georgia, Ohio, and Alabama are a focused, targeted attack led by right-wing groups hell-bent on overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and outlawing abortion completely in this country. Defending reproductive freedom means standing up and empowering women to make informed decisions with the support, guidance, and compassionate care of a doctor -- without interference from the state. **[If you are sick and tired of Republican attacks on women’s rights to their own health decisions, join me today in supporting the abortion rights organizations on the front lines of this fight. Add a donation today to benefit the Yellowhammer Fund, the Clinic Vest Project, ARC Southeast, and the National Network of Abortion Funds.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190515-abortion?refcode=ema190515-Full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&refcode2=4724_5755789_71sosX&akid=4724%2E5755789%2E71sosX)** We won’t go backward. Keep fighting. — Kamala Harris

---
PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header]
Dear Friend –
Last night the Republican-controlled Alabama Senate passed a law criminalizing abortion under punishment of 99 years in prison. They know the law is unconstitutional. That’s the exact reason they passed it – they want it to go to a court packed with right-wing ideologues who will overturn Roe v. Wade . If that happens, women could lose their constitutional right to choose. That is just one more reason we need to take back the Senate – so we can stop these nominees before they ever make it to the Supreme Court.
Rush a $5 donation to Teresa’s campaign right now so that we can defeat anti-choice David Perdue and have a Senate that will defend a women’s right to choose. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-alabama-ban?refcode=em051519a&noskip=true]
The way Republicans see it, they can do two things at once. Restrict abortion in their states, and get yet another chance at overturning Roe v. Wade in the Supreme Court. For them, governance isn’t about service – it’s about power over women. These Republicans don’t trust women to make their own choices, so we shouldn’t trust them with positions of leadership.
The wave of unconstitutional abortion bans rolling across the country – two dozen states have passed or proposed anti-abortion legislation this year alone – is a coordinated attempt to change the law at the federal level. The architects of this legislation want as many opportunities as possible to challenge Roe v. Wade and pin their hopes on the extreme rightward lurch of our federal court system.
It’s not only the Supreme Court. President Trump has nominated an entire roster of anti-choice jurists with Mitch McConnell and David Perdue’s stamp of approval. 105 judges have stacked the courts under this administration to restrict the rights of women and families. This shouldn’t be a surprise to anyone. During his 2016 campaign, Trump stated that women should be “punished” for having an abortion.
Don’t let it happen. Donate $5 to Teresa’s campaign right now so that we can fight back against anti-choice legislation at the federal level and appoint judges who will not act as ideologues when it comes to a woman’s right to choose. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-alabama-ban?refcode=em051519a&noskip=true]
Thank you for supporting Teresa in this important fight.
Team Tomlinson

name: Tim Kaine
subject: My thoughts on Alabama's abortion ban - I hope you'll read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Last night, the Alabama state legislature passed an extreme and unconstitutional ban on abortions, even for child victims of rape and incest. The ban would make abortion a felony from the moment of conception, punishable by up to 99 years in prison.

**I 'm writing to tell you that I stand with the women of Alabama in the face of this latest GOP demonstration of contempt for women.** [**I hope you 'll join me by signing this petition.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174a/3e0906/7bd8bf28/3e30b26e/2639312653/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-alabama-women?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+I+hope+yoursquoll+join+me+by+signing+thi&utm_campaign=20190515_1_PET_TK_Alabama-Ban&source=20190515_1_PET_TK_Alabama-Ban")

In the past 20 years, the abortion rate has been cut in half by better access to health care and contraception -- which the GOP has bitterly opposed. They prefer instead to criminalize women and doctors for making private, safe, and legal health care decisions. It's unconscionable.

**Women across the country have faced attack after attack from the Trump administration and, in many states, from their own legislators.** [**There has never been a more important time for all of us to speak out against these shameful attacks and stand beside women in the fight for full equality, which must include the right to make their own health care decisions.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174a/3e0906/7bd8bf28/3e30b26d/2639312653/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-alabama-women?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+There+has+never+been+a+more+important+ti&utm_campaign=20190515_1_PET_TK_Alabama-Ban&source=20190515_1_PET_TK_Alabama-Ban")

Thank you,

_Tim_

clean_body: | | Last night, the Alabama state legislature passed an extreme and unconstitutional ban on abortions, even for child victims of rape and incest. The ban would make abortion a felony from the moment of conception, punishable by up to 99 years in prison. I 'm writing to tell you that I stand with the women of Alabama in the face of this latest GOP demonstration of contempt for women. "" In the past 20 years, the abortion rate has been cut in half by better access to health care and contraception -- which the GOP has bitterly opposed. They prefer instead to criminalize women and doctors for making private, safe, and legal health care decisions. It's unconscionable. Women across the country have faced attack after attack from the Trump administration and, in many states, from their own legislators. "" Thank you, Tim | **** ""** | "" "" ""

name: Tina Smith
subject: URGENT: Abortion ban in Alabama. Fight back right now →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I need every single person standing with me and speaking out.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190515_em-header-full&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") Friend, **Late last night, lawmakers in Alabama passed the most extreme abortion ban in the country.** The bill outlaws abortion and criminalizes doctors -- threatening them with life in prison for providing patients with health care. **Let 's be absolutely clear: Abortion is NOT a crime. It's a constitutional right. A woman should be able to make a decision about what to do with her own body. And a doctor should be able to provide her care without risking jail time.** **[If you're with me, add your name right now to support a woman's right to make her own health care decisions. With the nation's eyes on this news today, we need everyone speaking out immediately against these cruel, unconstitutional attacks on women.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f6b8/c1f7015/63e205ed/1147ff40/2285255275/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201905_alabama-ld?source=rtw_20190515_em-ld-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f6b8/c1f7015/63e205ed/1147ff40/2285255275/VEsD/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201905_alabama-ld?source=rtw_20190515_em-ld-full") This bill in Alabama follows a similar one passed in Georgia last week, and other state legislatures are close to passing similar outright bans on abortion. These bills start a series of legal challenges that could culminate at the Supreme Court, opening the door for a direct challenge to _Roe v. Wade_. And with Trump's ultra-conservative Supreme Court justices ready to turn back the clock on reproductive rights, we could be up against the most significant rollback of reproductive rights in decades. **[I promise I'll never stop fighting for women's reproductive freedom. But in the face of these unconstitutional abortion bans, I need every single person standing with me and speaking out. Fight back right now by adding your name to support a woman's right to make her own health care decisions.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f6b8/c1f7015/63e205ed/1147ff40/2285255275/VEsB/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201905_alabama-ld?source=rtw_20190515_em-ld-full")** More soon, Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Wanna grab a beer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I can't wait to chat in person with you about how to move America forward -- and the drinks are on me. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377165b/691c9bd/6c679ba7/11a4806d/2048053852/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

There's a common question when it comes to picking a presidential candidate: _Who can you have a beer with?_

In honor of American Craft Beer Week, I'd like to up the ante. I was the first brewer elected governor of a U.S. state since Sam Adams in 1794, and now I'm running for president and am ready to actually pour you a cold one.

**Chip in now to be automatically entered for a chance to meet me on the campaign trail for a beer and an in-depth conversation at a local brewery --travel and hotel included.** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377165b/691c9bd/6c679ba7/11a4806a/2048053852/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?refcode=em_fr_20190515_JH_20190515-fr-JH-beercontest-all_all_contribbutton&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Before I became Mayor of Denver and Governor of Colorado, I spent 15 years owning and operating breweries, so I've got a lot to say about beer, bringing people together, and actually getting things done. So I want to sit down with you on the campaign trail, and share a round--learning about your family, your job, your challenges, your aspirations.

I can't wait to chat in person with you about how to move America forward--and the drinks are on me. [**_You have through Monday to enter -- so chip in now for your chance to win._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377165b/691c9bd/6c679ba7/11a4806b/2048053852/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?refcode=em_fr_20190515_JH_20190515-fr-JH-beercontest-all_all_l1&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Can't wait to see you,
John **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377165b/691c9bd/6c679ba7/11a48068/2048053852/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?refcode=em_fr_20190515_JH_20190515-fr-JH-beercontest-all_all_contribbutton2&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by **May 21st, 2019**. Enter by contributing [**_here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377165b/691c9bd/6c679ba7/11a48069/2048053852/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?source=rd_contestsignup"), or click [**_here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377165b/691c9bd/6c679ba7/11a48066/2048053852/VEsA/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/meet-john-on-the-campaign-trail") to enter without contributing. Three (3) winners will receive the following prize: **Round trip travel to the event city, one (1) night hotel accommodations, one (1) brewery tour, and one (1) meal with drinks** (approximate retail value of prize: **$1,500**). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. All prizes will be awarded. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 21 or older. Promotion subject to [**_Official Rules_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377165b/691c9bd/6c679ba7/11a48067/2048053852/VEsB/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/content/have-a-beer-with-hickenlooper-contest-rules/") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hickenlooper 2020, PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I'm going to Georgia tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
Because these attacks on abortion rights have got to stop.
| | |
---
Peter,
**This is not a hypothetical threat:** The onslaught of state abortion bans represents the greatest threat to reproductive freedom in our lifetimes.
Last week, Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp signed a six-week abortion ban into law. And last night, the Alabama state legislature sent a bill to the governor's desk that would completely outlaw almost all abortion. **It threatens doctors with life in prison --up to 99 years--for providing patients with health care, and GOP state legislators specifically declined to include exceptions for rape or incest.**
Women's lives will be in danger if these bans are allowed to stand, and low-income women, black women and women of color will suffer the most.
**That 's why I just announced I'm going to Georgia tomorrow.** We need to fight back, hard, on the frontlines.
This all-out assault on women's constitutional rights is explicitly aimed at overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , and we cannot stand for it. We need to loudly proclaim that reproductive rights are nonnegotiable and join together to defend them at every level--in Washington, in the courts and in the states.
**[I need to know you're with me as I head to Georgia tomorrow. Can you add your name to say you're committed to fighting for reproductive rights at every level of government--from the statehouse to the White House?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9772aa/2ae112ef/68873341/357c4874/2175823910/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiUGV0ZXIiLCJKU1ZNUVZOVVRrRk5SU1VsIjoiV2lsbGlzIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMTgzMjYiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMzAtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/fight-for-reproductive-rights?source=jtk3130-ja-gfp-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326")**

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Making Medicare for All a reality:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a9e9/6cd27893/4b1eb259/15802933/3593078644/VEsH/ "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | How many difficult conversations happen every year because our American health insurance system isn't a health _care_ system? How many families struggle each year, squeezed by an inability to pay the outrageous costs of care - even _if_ they have insurance? Instead of prioritizing _care_ for the sick and vulnerable, our _industry_ puts a premium on profits. That's wrong. **Which is why I'm proud to be working hard in the Senate to make Medicare for All a reality here in America.** My bottom line: _everyone_ should have access to Medicare. This is critically important in rural and underserved communities, where insurance choice is often a bottleneck. For something so commonsense, this fight to create decent health care for everyone has been tremendously difficult. From the struggle to even pass the Affordable Care Act in 2010, to the incessant efforts to push people off of insurance and drive up the costs, to the scare tactics about Medicare for All, the privileged and powerful are fighting hard to protect industry profits and their stranglehold on our care system. Which is why I'm writing to you today. **Over the coming weeks and months, you'll be hearing more about our efforts to make Medicare for All a reality here in America, and how you can get involved on the frontlines of this fight.** Stay tuned. name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
This is the most important thing we can do in the face of proposed abortion bans.
#

In just a minute, I am going to ask you to make a donation to organizations that help low-income women pay for reproductive healthcare. Let me first explain why.
**Late last night, the Alabama legislature passed a bill that would outlaw 99% of abortions.** No exemptions for rape or incest. No rights for women who don’t want to be pregnant. Doctors who perform abortions could be imprisoned for 99 years.
Georgia passed its own bill last week that would ban abortions after six weeks — before most women know they’re pregnant. Last month Ohio signed its own version into law. And Mississippi passed its own abortion ban the month before that.
Politicians should not be getting in the way of a woman and her medical decisions. These are difficult family decisions that governments should not interfere with. These bills and laws are outrageous assaults on women’s rights that have a singular goal: forcing the Supreme Court to take up a case that would overturn Roe v. Wade.
**One of the most powerful actions that we can take in response to these bans is to fund local groups that help provide access to clinics for low-income women.** These are organizations on the front lines of abortion rights making sure that women who need an abortion can afford to pay for one.
That’s why I’m asking you today:
[**Will you split a $3 contribution to three abortion support networks in Alabama, the Southeast, and across the country so that low-income women can get abortions and reproductive care? Your donation will send a powerful message in support of abortion rights.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/13720?refcode=em190515-2-abortionsupport-bernie-30&t=25&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/13720?refcode=em190515-2-abortionsupport-bernie-30&t=26&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk)
These groups provide direct service to women who need abortions but can’t afford the medical costs, transportation, or lodging required to actually get the abortion, due to the burdensome restrictions put in place by bills like this. They are always in need of additional funding, doing the critical work of caring for women who are in desperate need of help.
These are the groups we are asking you to support today:
> **Yellowhammer Fund** is a group in Alabama that provides funding for medical costs, transportation, and lodging for women who get abortions at any of Alabama’s three abortion clinics. Fifty-nine percent of women in Alabama don’t have an abortion clinic in their county, and Yellowhammer Fund does all it can to make sure Alabama women are able to get the abortions they need.
> **Access Reproductive Care-Southeast** is a group that provides financial and logistical support for women and their families who want abortions in Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Mississippi, South Carolina, and Tennessee. They help women plan for their abortions, and help cover the costs associated with accessing this medical care.
> **The National Network of Abortion Funds** is an umbrella organization for local abortion groups throughout the United States — groups like Yellowhammer and Access Reproductive Care-Southeast. They connect people with their local funds, and provide support to the groups themselves.
When fundamental human and constitutional rights are under attack, we must respond and do the most good that we can. That starts with helping low-income women get support for the abortions they need.
[**Please donate to these abortion support networks today.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/13720?refcode=em190515-2-abortionsupport-bernie-30&t=27&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk)
Thank you for standing with women and for abortion rights.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/13720?refcode=em190515-2-abortionsupport-bernie-30&t=28&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk)
* * *

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=30&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=1370_150750_TVedEk&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=32&akid=1370%2E150750%2ETVedEk).

name: kamalaharris.org
subject: Help us raise $80,000 for the groups on the front lines (Alabama)
body:
This is not a normal fundraising email. Alabama just passed a law to
effectively ban abortion in the state -- with no exceptions for instances
of rape or incest. The law even threatens doctors performing the procedure
with up to 99 years in prison.

Make no mistake, Roe v. Wade is under attack and we need to fight back.
Since Kamala first emailed you this morning, this grassroots team has
raised tens of thousands of dollars for abortion rights groups on the
front lines of the fight.

Now we’re
setting a goal: we think we can raise $80,000 online for these groups
before tonight at midnight. Let’s send a loud, clear message that we
aren’t backing down. Are you in?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190515-abortion?refcode=ema190515-lift-a&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1001&refcode2=4730_5755789_l3FNs_&akid=4730%2E5755789%2El3FNs_ ]Add a donation today to raise funds for the following organizations on
the front lines of this fight: the Yellowhammer Fund, the Clinic Vest
Project, ARC Southeast, and the National Network of Abortion Funds.

We need to fight back against this outright assault on women’s bodily
autonomy with everything we’ve got. Every donation you give today will
help these organizations continue to remove financial and logistical
barriers to abortion access and protect a woman’s right to make her own
health care decisions.

— Team Kamala

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original message from Kamala Harris, May 15, 2019

Outlawing access to abortion -- including in cases of rape or incest.

Threatening to punish doctors who provide abortion care with up to 99
years of jail time.

This
isn't a scene from The Handmaid's Tale. This is happening in Alabama -- in
our country -- in the year 2019.

Alabama just passed legislation banning abortions at every stage of
pregnancy. Doctors performing abortions could face up to 99 years in
prison, and the law includes no exceptions for rape or incest.

This is a blatant attack on Roe v. Wade. It is a direct attack on women
across our country. Restricting access to safe, legal abortion puts
women’s lives at risk.

We cannot afford to wring our hands. We need to fight back now, raising
our voices together to say we won’t be dragged backward and putting our
collective power to work.

Here’s how we can fight back:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190515-abortion?refcode=ema190515-lift-a&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1002&refcode2=4730_5755789_l3FNs_&akid=4730%2E5755789%2El3FNs_ ]Click here to split a donation to abortion rights groups on the front
lines of this fight today. Take action today to defend access to safe,
legal abortion in our country.

Your donation today will benefit the following organizations that are
leading the fight to defend women’s rights and access to health care:

* The Yellowhammer Fund provides funding for anyone seeking care at one
of Alabama's three abortion clinics and will help with other barriers
to access (travel, lodging, etc.).
* The Clinic Vest Project provides free clinic escort vests to groups
that service facilities that support the full range of reproductive
health options including safe and legal abortion.
* ARC Southeast helps Southerners and their families navigate the
pathways to access safe, compassionate, and affordable reproductive
care by providing financial and logistical support and building power
in our communities through advocacy, education, and leadership
development.
* The National Network of Abortion Funds builds power with members to
remove financial and logistical barriers to abortion access by
centering people who have an abortion and organizing at the
intersections of racial, economic, and reproductive justice.

These anti-choice bills in states like Georgia, Ohio, and Alabama are a
focused, targeted attack led by right-wing groups hell-bent on overturning
Roe v. Wade and outlawing abortion completely in this country.

Defending reproductive freedom means standing up and empowering women to
make informed decisions with the support, guidance, and compassionate care
of a doctor -- without interference from the state.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190515-abortion?refcode=ema190515-lift-a&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1003&refcode2=4730_5755789_l3FNs_&akid=4730%2E5755789%2El3FNs_ ]If you are sick and tired of Republican attacks on women’s rights to
their own health decisions, join me today in supporting the abortion
rights organizations on the front lines of this fight. Add a donation
today to benefit the Yellowhammer Fund, the Clinic Vest Project, ARC
Southeast, and the National Network of Abortion Funds.

We won’t go backward. Keep fighting.

— Kamala Harris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4730%2E5755789%2El3FNs_

name: Cory Booker
subject: Alabama just stripped women of health care rights by making abortion procedures a felony. We have to fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Last night, the Alabama Senate voted to strip women of health care rights by making abortion procedures a felony, with no exceptions for survivors of rape or incest. **And just moments ago, the governor signed the bill into law.** The Alabama abortion ban is part of a full-frontal effort meant to erode women's reproductive rights and their freedom nationwide. But let me be clear: women shouldn't have to face this fight alone. It's on us men to speak out, too. It's on us to take action. Not because women are our mothers, wives, daughters. Because women are people. And all people deserve to control their own bodies. **Today, when the attacks on women's rights feel particularly acute, we must put our money where our mouths are to support women.[Please join me in donating to organizations doing critical work on the ground. Click here to chip in.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc768d/5fca0d19/1e0acfda/291b0605/505887512/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-abortion-access?refcode=em_booker_20190515")** _Your contribution will benefit the following organizations: Access Reproductive Care-Southeast, Clinic Vest Project, National Network Of Abortion Funds, Planned Parenthood, and Yellowhammer Fund._ Team, we can't get stuck in despair. Together, we can stop this dangerous, far-right movement to erode women's rights and access to health care. Together, we can organize to demand reproductive justice. And together, we must take action. Reproductive justice is a human rights issue, an economic issue and as President, I will fight tirelessly to defend access to reproductive care. We will fully fund Planned Parenthood. We will end the epidemic of maternal mortality in America. We will permanently repeal the Hyde Amendment, and the United States will lead the way in putting an end to the global assault on women's rights. We will roll back the HHS rule allowing certain universities and private employers to opt out of coverage for birth control. And not only will I appoint Supreme Court justices who will defend _Roe v. Wade_ , I will fight to codify it into federal law. **Bills like this one in Alabama are designed to take away women 's right to choose, and silence women's voices. We can't stand for it, and we won't stand for it.** [_**Join me today in doing everything in our power to protect abortion access, not only in Alabama, but across the country -- make a donation to support these amazing organizations at this critical moment.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc768d/5fca0d19/1e0acfda/291b0604/505887512/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-abortion-access?refcode=em_booker_20190515") Let's keep fighting together, Cory
---

But let me be clear: women shouldn't have to face this fight alone. It's on us men to speak out, too. It's on us to take action. Not because women are our mothers, wives, daughters. Because women are people. And all people deserve to control their own bodies. Today, when the attacks on women's rights feel particularly acute, we must put our money where our mouths are to support women. "" Your contribution will benefit the following organizations: Access Reproductive Care-Southeast, Clinic Vest Project, National Network Of Abortion Funds, Planned Parenthood, and Yellowhammer Fund. Team, we can't get stuck in despair. Together, we can stop this dangerous, far-right movement to erode women's rights and access to health care. Together, we can organize to demand reproductive justice. And together, we must take action. Reproductive justice is a human rights issue, an economic issue and as President, I will fight tirelessly to defend access to reproductive care. We will fully fund Planned Parenthood. We will end the epidemic of maternal mortality in America. We will permanently repeal the Hyde Amendment, and the United States will lead the way in putting an end to the global assault on women's rights. We will roll back the HHS rule allowing certain universities and private employers to opt out of coverage for birth control. And not only will I appoint Supreme Court justices who will defend Roe v. Wade , I will fight to codify it into federal law. Bills like this one in Alabama are designed to take away women 's right to choose, and silence women's voices. We can't stand for it, and we won't stand for it. "" Let's keep fighting together, Cory | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, "" This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on "", "", and "". It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "". Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info "".
